name: combobox
title: Combobox
description: A searchable select in a clean popover.

files.content:
<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive, type WithoutChildrenOrChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		sideOffset = 6,
		portalProps,
		children,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChildrenOrChild<ComboboxPrimitive.ContentProps> & {
		class?: string;
		portalProps?: ComboboxPrimitive.PortalProps;
		children: Snippet;
	} = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.Portal {...portalProps}>
	<ComboboxPrimitive.Content
		bind:ref
		{sideOffset}
		class={cn(
			'z-50 max-h-72 w-[var(--bits-combobox-anchor-width)] min-w-[var(--bits-combobox-anchor-width)] overflow-y-auto rounded-xl bg-popover dark:border dark:border-border p-1 text-popover-foreground shadow-lg transition-[opacity,transform] duration-150 data-[state=closed]:scale-95 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=open]:scale-100 data-[state=open]:opacity-100',
			className
		)}
		{...restProps}
	>
		{@render children?.()}
	</ComboboxPrimitive.Content>
</ComboboxPrimitive.Portal>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: ComboboxPrimitive.GroupHeadingProps & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.GroupHeading
	bind:ref
	class={cn('px-2 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground', className)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: ComboboxPrimitive.GroupProps & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.Group bind:ref class={cn(className)} {...restProps} />

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive, type WithoutChildrenOrChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChildrenOrChild<ComboboxPrimitive.InputProps> & {
		class?: string;
	} = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.Input
	bind:ref
	class={cn(
		'flex h-10 w-full items-center rounded-full bg-secondary px-3.5 py-2 text-sm outline-none transition-[box-shadow,border-color] duration-150 placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring/35 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
/>
{#snippet children({ selected })} {#if selected} {/if} {#if childrenProp} {@render childrenProp()} {:else} {label ?? value} {/if} {/snippet}

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive, type WithoutChildrenOrChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import ChevronsUpDown from '@lucide/svelte/icons/chevrons-up-down';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChildrenOrChild<ComboboxPrimitive.TriggerProps> & {
		class?: string;
	} = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.Trigger
	bind:ref
	class={cn(
		'absolute right-2 top-1/2 inline-flex size-6 -translate-y-1/2 items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground outline-none transition-[scale] duration-150 active:scale-[0.96] disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
>
	<ChevronsUpDown class="size-4 opacity-60" />
</ComboboxPrimitive.Trigger>
